1: C=3, A=1, T=20. Add them together: 3 + 1 + 20 = 24. Tip: Use EJOTY anchors (E=5, J=10, O=15, T=20, Y=25) for quick letter counting! ✓
2: B=2, E=5, D=4. Total: 2 + 5 + 4 = 11. Tip: E=5 is an EJOTY anchor — use it to double-check nearby letters (D=4, F=6). ✓
3: A=1, G=7, E=5. Total: 1 + 7 + 5 = 13. Tip: Double-check by adding the numbers in a different order. ✓
4: FIG: F=6+I=9+G=7=22. HEN: H=8+E=5+N=14=27. APE: A=1+P=16+E=5=22. COW: C=3+O=15+W=23=41. DOG: D=4+O=15+G=7=26. COW has the highest value at 41. Tip: For comparison questions, estimate first — words with late-alphabet letters score higher. ✓
6: B=4, A=2, D=8. BAD = 4 + 2 + 8 = 14. Each letter equals its position doubled (A=2, B=4, C=6, D=8). Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't try to hold everything in your head. ✓
7: A=3, B=5, C=7. A + B + C = 3 + 5 + 7 = 15. Tip: When the values are given (not alphabet positions), re-read them carefully before adding. ✓
9: P=16, I=9, G=7. Total: 16 + 9 + 7 = 32. Tip: Learn the alphabet in groups of 5 (A-E=1-5, F-J=6-10, K-O=11-15, P-T=16-20, U-Z=21-26). ✓
10: BAD: B=2+A=1+D=4=7. BIG: B=2+I=9+G=7=18. BAG: B=2+A=1+G=7=10. BED: B=2+E=5+D=4=11. BID: B=2+I=9+D=4=15. BAD has the lowest value at 7. Tip: All five words start with B, so compare the last two letters only — it saves time. ✓
11: A=5, B=10, C=15. A + B − C = 5 + 10 − 15 = 0. Tip: Use EJOTY anchors (E=5, J=10, O=15, T=20, Y=25) for quick letter counting! ✓
12: A=4, B=7, C=2. First multiply: A × B = 4 × 7 = 28. Then subtract: 28 − C = 28 − 2 = 26. Remember BODMAS — multiplication before subtraction. Tip: When a line mixes × with + or −, always do the × first — even if the − comes later. ✓
13: F=6, A=1, C=3, E=5. Total: 6 + 1 + 3 + 5 = 15. Tip: E=5 is an EJOTY anchor — use it to spot-check nearby letters quickly. ✓
14: B=6, C=9, A=3. First multiply: B × C = 6 × 9 = 54. Then divide: 54 ÷ A = 54 ÷ 3 = 18. Remember BODMAS — brackets and multiplication before division (left to right here). Tip: For × and ÷ on the same line, work strictly left to right. ✓
15: S=19, U=21, N=14. Total: 19 + 21 + 14 = 54. Tip: Double-check by adding the numbers in a different order. ✓
16: H=8, A=1, T=20. Total: 8 + 1 + 20 = 29. Tip: T=20 is an EJOTY anchor — lean on it for speed with nearby letters. ✓
18: B=2, O=15, X=24. Total: 2 + 15 + 24 = 41. Tip: O=15 is an EJOTY anchor — use it to pin down nearby letters (N=14, P=16). ✓
19: J=10, A=1, M=13. Total: 10 + 1 + 13 = 24. Tip: J=10 is an EJOTY anchor, and M sits at 13 — the middle of the alphabet. ✓
20: F=6, I=9, G=7. Total: 6 + 9 + 7 = 22. Tip: Pair F+G (6+7=13) then add I=9 to reach 22 — pairing small values helps. ✓
21: P=16, E=5, N=14. Total: 16 + 5 + 14 = 35. Tip: Use EJOTY anchors (E=5, J=10, O=15, T=20, Y=25) for quick letter counting! ✓
22: F=6, I=9, S=19, H=8. Total: 6 + 9 + 19 + 8 = 42. Tip: Add in pairs that make round numbers — 6+8=14, 9+19=28, total 42. ✓
23: C=3, A=1, K=11, E=5. Total: 3 + 1 + 11 + 5 = 20. Tip: Double-check by adding the numbers in a different order. ✓
24: J=10, U=21, M=13, P=16. Total: 10 + 21 + 13 + 16 = 60. Tip: J=10 is an EJOTY anchor — always a handy starting point. ✓
26: D=4, R=18, U=21, M=13. Total: 4 + 18 + 21 + 13 = 56. Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't try to hold everything in your head. ✓
27: L=12, I=9, M=13, E=5. Total: 12 + 9 + 13 + 5 = 39. Tip: Learn the alphabet in groups of 5 (A-E=1-5, F-J=6-10, K-O=11-15, P-T=16-20, U-Z=21-26). ✓
28: BIKE: 2+9+11+5=27. HIKE: 8+9+11+5=33. LIKE: 12+9+11+5=37. MIKE: 13+9+11+5=38. PIKE: 16+9+11+5=41. PIKE has the highest value at 41. Tip: All five words end in IKE — compare only the first letters to save time. ✓
29: OAK: 15+1+11=27. ELM: 5+12+13=30. ASH: 1+19+8=28. FIR: 6+9+18=33. YEW: 25+5+23=53. OAK has the lowest value at 27. Tip: Use EJOTY anchors (E=5, J=10, O=15, T=20, Y=25) for quick letter counting! ✓
30: B=2, R=18, A=1, V=22, E=5. Total: 2 + 18 + 1 + 22 + 5 = 48. Tip: Late-alphabet letters (R, V) are the big hitters here — add those first to keep a running total. ✓
31: L=12, I=9, G=7, H=8, T=20. Total: 12 + 9 + 7 + 8 + 20 = 56. Tip: Double-check by adding the numbers in a different order. ✓
32: S=19, T=20, O=15, N=14, E=5. Total: 19 + 20 + 15 + 14 + 5 = 73. Tip: Four EJOTY-neighbour letters here (S, T, O, E) — lean on the anchors to speed it up. ✓
34: R=18, I=9, V=22, E=5, R=18. Total: 18 + 9 + 22 + 5 + 18 = 72. Tip: R appears twice — make sure you count it both times (a common trap with repeated letters). ✓
35: FLAME: 6+12+1+13+5=37. BLAZE: 2+12+1+26+5=46. SPARK: 19+16+1+18+11=65. EMBER: 5+13+2+5+18=43. LIGHT: 12+9+7+8+20=56. SPARK has the highest value at 65. Tip: Estimate first — words with late-alphabet letters (S, P, R) usually score highest. ✓
36: R=18, U=21, N=14. Total: 18 + 21 + 14 = 53. Tip: All three letters are past the midpoint — expect a total above 30. ✓
37: D=4, E=5, N=14. Total: 4 + 5 + 14 = 23. Tip: Use EJOTY anchors (E=5, J=10, O=15, T=20, Y=25) for quick letter counting! ✓
38: N=14, E=5, S=19, T=20. Total: 14 + 5 + 19 + 20 = 58. Tip: Add in pairs that make round numbers — 14+5=19, paired with 19+20=39, total 58. ✓
39: W=23, O=15, L=12, F=6. Total: 23 + 15 + 12 + 6 = 56. Tip: Double-check by adding the numbers in a different order. ✓
40: Q=17, U=21, E=5, E=5, N=14. Total: 17 + 21 + 5 + 5 + 14 = 62. Tip: E appears twice — count both Es (a common letter-sum trap with double letters). ✓
42: F=6, R=18, O=15, S=19, T=20. Total: 6 + 18 + 15 + 19 + 20 = 78. Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't try to hold everything in your head. ✓
43: M=13, A=1, P=16. Total: 13 + 1 + 16 = 30. Tip: Learn the alphabet in groups of 5 (A-E=1-5, F-J=6-10, K-O=11-15, P-T=16-20, U-Z=21-26). ✓
44: STOP: S=19+T=20+O=15+P=16 = 70. STEP: S=19+T=20+E=5+P=16 = 60. Difference: 70 − 60 = 10. Tip: Only the third letter differs (O vs E) — the difference is just O − E = 15 − 5 = 10. ✓
46: A=2, B=5, C=9. A + B + C = 2 + 5 + 9 = 16. Tip: Spot pairs that make round numbers — 2 + 9 = 11, then add 5 to get 16. ✓
48: A=8, B=3, C=5. A + B = 8 + 3 = 11. Then 11 − C = 11 − 5 = 6. Tip: Only + and − here, so just work strictly left to right. ✓
49: A=5, B=6, C=3. By BODMAS, multiply first: A × B = 5 × 6 = 30. Then add: 30 + C = 30 + 3 = 33. Tip: Mixed operators — always do × before + or −, even when + appears first. ✓
50: A=9, B=4, C=6. Work out the × part first (this is the standard maths rule — × and ÷ are done before + and −). A × B = 9 × 4 = 36. Now subtract: 36 − C = 36 − 6 = 30. Tip: When a letter sum mixes × with + or −, do the × first, then the + or − — even if the × comes later in the line. ✓
51: A=7, B=3, C=2. Brackets first: A − B = 7 − 3 = 4. Then multiply: 4 × C = 4 × 2 = 8. Tip: Brackets always come first in BODMAS — do what's inside them before anything else. ✓
52: A=8, B=2. By BODMAS, divide first: A ÷ B = 8 ÷ 2 = 4. Then add: 4 + 5 = 9. Tip: × and ÷ are done before + and −, so tackle the division first. ✓
53: A=4, B=11, C=3. B − A = 11 − 4 = 7. Then 7 + C = 7 + 3 = 10. Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't try to hold everything in your head. ✓
54: A=6, B=5. By BODMAS, multiply first: A × B = 6 × 5 = 30. Then subtract: 30 − A = 30 − 6 = 24. Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't hold everything in your head. ✓
55: A=3, B=5, C=2. Brackets first: B + C = 5 + 2 = 7. Then multiply: A × 7 = 3 × 7 = 21. Tip: Whatever is in brackets always comes first — do that before the ×. ✓
56: A=2, B=4, C=6, D=3. By BODMAS, do multiplication and division first: A × B = 2 × 4 = 8 and C ÷ D = 6 ÷ 3 = 2. Then add: 8 + 2 = 10. Tip: Work out both × and ÷ parts before you touch the + sign. ✓
57: A=2, B=3, C=10. By BODMAS, multiply first: A × B = 2 × 3 = 6. Then subtract: C − 6 = 10 − 6 = 4. Remember, multiplication comes before subtraction. Tip: The trap here is C − A first (=8), then × B (=24). Always do the × before the − . ✓
58: A=12, B=4, C=7. By BODMAS, divide first: A ÷ B = 12 ÷ 4 = 3. Then add: 3 + C = 3 + 7 = 10. Tip: ÷ is done before +, even though + looks simpler. ✓
59: A=7, B=9. By BODMAS, multiply first: 2 × A = 2 × 7 = 14. Then add: 14 + B = 14 + 9 = 23. Tip: Always do × before + — even when the number (2) comes before the letter. ✓
60: A=1, B=4, C=8, D=5. First bracket: A + B = 1 + 4 = 5. Second bracket: C − D = 8 − 5 = 3. Then multiply: 5 × 3 = 15. Tip: Work out each bracket fully before multiplying — treat each bracket as one number. ✓
61: A=10, B=3, C=2. In maths, × is always done before − (it doesn't matter that − comes first when you read left to right). So work out B × C first: 3 × 2 = 6. Now subtract that from A: 10 − 6 = 4. If you did A − B first you'd get 7, then × C would give 14 — that's the trap. Tip: Underline the × or ÷ part in the line and do it before anything else. ✓
62: A=4, B=2, C=8. Brackets first: C + A = 8 + 4 = 12. Then divide: 12 ÷ B = 12 ÷ 2 = 6. Tip: Brackets always come first — finish the sum inside before dividing. ✓
63: A=5, B=7. By BODMAS, multiply first: A × A = 5 × 5 = 25. Then subtract: 25 − B = 25 − 7 = 18. Tip: A × A means A multiplied by itself — work that out first, then subtract. ✓
64: A=3, B=2, C=5, D=4. By BODMAS, do both multiplications first: A × C = 3 × 5 = 15 and B × D = 2 × 4 = 8. Then subtract: 15 − 8 = 7. Tip: When two × parts sit around a − sign, work out both products first, then subtract. ✓
66: A=4, B=3. By BODMAS, multiply first: B × B = 3 × 3 = 9. Then add: 9 + A = 9 + 4 = 13. Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't hold everything in your head. ✓
67: A=10, B=6, C=2. First bracket: A − B = 10 − 6 = 4. Second bracket: A − C = 10 − 2 = 8. Then multiply: 4 × 8 = 32. Tip: Double-check by adding the numbers in a different order. ✓
68: A=8, B=3, C=1. A − B = 8 − 3 = 5. Then 5 − C = 5 − 1 = 4. Tip: Only subtractions here — just work strictly left to right. ✓
69: A=3, B=8, C=3. By BODMAS, work left to right for multiplication and division: B × C = 8 × 3 = 24. Then 24 ÷ A = 24 ÷ 3 = 8. Tip: When × and ÷ appear together, work strictly left to right. ✓
71: A=5, B=2, C=4. By BODMAS, do both multiplications first: A × B = 5 × 2 = 10 and A × C = 5 × 4 = 20. Then add: 10 + 20 = 30. Tip: When two × parts sit around a + sign, work out both products before adding. ✓
72: A=9, B=2. By BODMAS, multiply first: A × B = 9 × 2 = 18. Then add: 18 + B = 18 + 2 = 20. Tip: Do the × before the + — even when the same letter (B) appears on both sides. ✓
73: A=6, B=2, C=5. Brackets first: A + C = 6 + 5 = 11. Then multiply: 11 × B = 11 × 2 = 22. Finally subtract: 22 − C = 22 − 5 = 17. Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't try to hold everything in your head. ✓
74: A=7, B=4, C=3. By BODMAS, multiply first: B × C = 4 × 3 = 12. Then add: A + 12 = 7 + 12 = 19. Be careful — multiplication comes before addition! Tip: The trap answer (33) comes from adding A + B first — always spot the × and do it first. ✓
75: Call the missing number n. The line becomes 2 × n + n, which is 3 lots of n altogether, so 3 × n = 27. That means n = 27 ÷ 3 = 9. Check: 2 × 9 + 9 = 18 + 9 = 27. Tip: When the same unknown appears twice in a line, count how many of it there are in total — then divide to find its value. ✓
76: A + B + C = 2 + 5 + 3 = 10. Tip: Double-check by adding the numbers in a different order. ✓
80: B − A + C = 10 − 5 + 2 = 7. Tip: Only + and −, so just work strictly left to right. ✓
81: B × C + A = 7 × 4 + 3. By BODMAS, multiply first: 7 × 4 = 28. Then add: 28 + 3 = 31. Tip: Do × before + — even when + looks like the easier step. ✓
82: A ÷ B + C = 8 ÷ 2 + 5. By BODMAS, divide first: 8 ÷ 2 = 4. Then add: 4 + 5 = 9. Tip: × and ÷ always go before + and −, so tackle the division first. ✓
83: C − A × B = 9 − 6 × 3. By BODMAS, multiply first: 6 × 3 = 18. Then subtract: 9 − 18 = −9. Remember, multiplication comes before subtraction! Tip: A negative answer is fine — it just means the × part was bigger than C. ✓
84: A × B − B = 5 × 4 − 4. By BODMAS, multiply first: 5 × 4 = 20. Then subtract: 20 − 4 = 16. Tip: Do × before − — even when the same letter (B) appears on both sides. ✓
85: Brackets first: A + B = 7 + 3 = 10. Then multiply: 10 × C = 10 × 6 = 60. Tip: Brackets always come first — finish the sum inside, then multiply. ✓
86: A × B − A = 11 × 3 − 11. By BODMAS, multiply first: 11 × 3 = 33. Then subtract: 33 − 11 = 22. Tip: Remember BODMAS! Multiply before you add or subtract. ✓
87: A − B × C = 9 − 4 × 2. By BODMAS, multiply first: 4 × 2 = 8. Then subtract: 9 − 8 = 1. Be careful — multiplication comes before subtraction! Tip: The trap answer (10) comes from doing A − B first — always spot the × and do it first. ✓
88: A ÷ B + C = 15 ÷ 5 + 8. By BODMAS, divide first: 15 ÷ 5 = 3. Then add: 3 + 8 = 11. Tip: ÷ is always done before +, no matter which comes first in the line. ✓
89: A × B − C × D = 3 × 5 − 2 × 4. By BODMAS, do both multiplications first: 3 × 5 = 15 and 2 × 4 = 8. Then subtract: 15 − 8 = 7. Tip: When two × parts sit around a − sign, work out both products before subtracting. ✓
90: First bracket: A + B = 4 + 6 = 10. Second bracket: B − C = 6 − 2 = 4. Then multiply: 10 × 4 = 40. Tip: Write down intermediate totals — don't try to hold everything in your head. ✓
91: C × D ÷ A + B = 6 × 4 ÷ 2 + 3. By BODMAS, do multiplication and division left to right: 6 × 4 = 24, then 24 ÷ 2 = 12. Then add: 12 + 3 = 15. Tip: When × and ÷ appear together, work strictly left to right — neither beats the other. ✓
92: B × B − A × C = 8 × 8 − 5 × 3. By BODMAS, do both multiplications first: 8 × 8 = 64 and 5 × 3 = 15. Then subtract: 64 − 15 = 49. Tip: B × B means B multiplied by itself — work that out like any other × sum. ✓
93: Brackets first: A − B = 7 − 2 = 5. Then multiply: 5 × C = 5 × 3 = 15. Then add: 15 + D = 15 + 5 = 20. Tip: Brackets first, then × , then + — follow BODMAS one layer at a time. ✓
94: B × C ÷ D + A = 9 × 4 ÷ 3 + 2. By BODMAS, multiplication and division left to right: 9 × 4 = 36, then 36 ÷ 3 = 12. Then add: 12 + 2 = 14. Tip: Double-check by adding in a different order. ✓
95: ACE = A(1)+C(3)+E(5) = 9. DAD = D(4)+A(1)+D(4) = 9. BIG = B(2)+I(9)+G(7) = 18. HEN = H(8)+E(5)+N(14) = 27. FIG = F(6)+I(9)+G(7) = 22. ACE and DAD both equal 9! Tip: Calculate ALL words before comparing — don't stop early! ✓
96: STONE = S(19)+T(20)+O(15)+N(14)+E(5) = 73. PLANE = P(16)+L(12)+A(1)+N(14)+E(5) = 48. MOUSE = M(13)+O(15)+U(21)+S(19)+E(5) = 73. TRAIN = T(20)+R(18)+A(1)+I(9)+N(14) = 62. TIGER = T(20)+I(9)+G(7)+E(5)+R(18) = 59. STONE and MOUSE both equal 73! Tip: Calculate ALL words before comparing — don't stop early! ✓
97: CAT = 24. DOG = 26. Difference = 26 - 24 = 2. Tip: Always subtract the smaller from the larger! ✓
98: FISH = 42. BIRD = 33. Difference = 42 - 33 = 9. Tip: Always subtract the smaller from the larger! ✓
99: HOME = 41. LAND = 31. Difference = 41 - 31 = 10. Tip: Always subtract the smaller from the larger! ✓
100: SMILE = 58. FROWN = 76. Difference = 76 - 58 = 18. Tip: Always subtract the smaller from the larger! ✓
101: TIGER = 59. MOUSE = 73. Difference = 73 - 59 = 14. Tip: Always subtract the smaller from the larger! ✓
102: E = 5, B = 2. So E - B = 5 - 2 = 3. Tip: Use EJOTY anchors (E=5, J=10, O=15, T=20, Y=25) for quick counting! ✓
103: H = 8, C = 3. So H - C = 8 - 3 = 5. Tip: H sits in the F-J group (6-10) — grouping letters in fives helps you find them fast. ✓
104: G = 7, D = 4. So G - D = 7 - 4 = 3. Tip: Both letters live in the first ten — count on from A to lock in their values. ✓
105: M = 13, F = 6. So M - F = 13 - 6 = 7. Tip: M sits right in the middle of the alphabet (position 13) — a useful landmark. ✓
106: P = 16, H = 8. So P - H = 16 - 8 = 8. Tip: P starts the P-T group (16-20) and H sits in F-J (6-10) — groups of five make positions quick to find. ✓
107: T = 20, K = 11. So T - K = 20 - 11 = 9. Tip: Use EJOTY anchors (E=5, J=10, O=15, T=20, Y=25) for quick counting! ✓
108: SNOW=71, SUN=54, WIND=50, RAIN=42, HAIL=30. SNOW has the highest value at 71! Tip: Estimate first — words with late-alphabet letters (S,T,U,V,W) score higher. ✓
109: PLUM=62, LEMON=59, MANGO=50, GRAPE=47, PEACH=33. PLUM has the highest value at 62! Tip: Estimate first — words with late-alphabet letters (S,T,U,V,W) score higher. ✓
110: R(18) + H(8) + Y(25) + T(20) + H(8) + M(13) = 92. Tip: H appears twice — remember to count it both times (a classic double-letter trap). ✓
111: W(23) + I(9) + Z(26) + A(1) + R(18) + D(4) = 81. Tip: W, Z, R are all high-value letters — expect a total in the 70s or 80s. ✓
112: M(13) + O(15) + N(14) + E(5) + Y(25) = 72. Tip: Three EJOTY neighbours here (O=15, E=5, Y=25) — use the anchors to speed it up. ✓
114: E(5) × C(3) = 15. Tip: E=5 is an EJOTY anchor — handy for quick position checks. ✓
116: D(4) × E(5) = 20, then 20 - C(3) = 17. Remember BODMAS — multiply first! Tip: Mixed operators — always do × before − , even when − appears later. ✓
117: G(7) × B(2) = 14, then 14 + D(4) = 18. Multiply before adding! Tip: Mixed operators — always do × before + , even when + comes second. ✓
118: F(6) × C(3) = 18, then 18 - E(5) = 13. BODMAS: multiply first! Tip: Mixed operators — always do × before − to avoid the trap. ✓
119: H(8) × B(2) = 16, then 16 - C(3) = 13. Tip: Mixed operators — always do × before − , no matter the order shown. ✓
120: E(5) × D(4) = 20, then 20 + B(2) = 22. Tip: Mixed operators — always do × before + , even when + comes later. ✓
121: C(3) × C(3) = 9, then 9 × B(2) = 18. Tip: Only × signs here — work strictly left to right. ✓
122: F(6) + G(7) = 13, then 13 - D(4) = 9. Tip: Work left to right, writing down each intermediate total! ✓
123: J(10) - E(5) = 5, then 5 + C(3) = 8. Tip: J=10 and E=5 are both EJOTY anchors — lean on them for speed. ✓
124: H(8) + D(4) = 12, then 12 - F(6) = 6. Tip: Work left to right, writing down each intermediate total! ✓
125: K(11) - G(7) = 4, then 4 + E(5) = 9. Tip: Work left to right, writing down each intermediate total! ✓
126: T(20) - J(10) = 10, + E(5) = 15, - B(2) = 13. Tip: Three EJOTY anchors in one line (T, J, E) — the anchors make this one quick. ✓
127: M(13) + H(8) = 21, - K(11) = 10, + C(3) = 13. Tip: Work left to right, writing down each intermediate total! ✓
128: O(15) - F(6) + D(4) - A(1) = 12. Work left to right: 15-6=9, 9+4=13, 13-1=12. Tip: Write down intermediate totals! ✓
